site.title: Contact Us - Ion Print & Promo
site.description: Get in touch with ION Print & Promo (formerly Gibson Digital Print Designs & Signs, PROS Marketing and IO Promo). Call today for print and promo product solutions fo your business Real people, real service, local expertise.

contact.description:
We're still the same great team you know and trust — formerly Gibson's Print & PROS Marketing — just with a new name and an even stronger lineup of print and promotional services.

We believe personal, reliable service is what our clients deserve. We take pride in being local, responsive, and always easy to reach.

features.title: Same great service, in Midland!
features.description:
For friendly, local support and service in the Midland area, visit our location at 304-9170 County Rd. 93.

Our commitment to quality, and great service remains the same.

Contact our Midland office by phone at 705-527-7767 or email us at sales@iongroup.ca for more information.
features.imageAlt: Modern digital printing equipment producing high-quality materials

cta.heading: We are here to answer your call. Get in touch with us today!
